name: toolshell-presentation
description: Marp slide deck about ToolShell / CVE-2025-53770

scripts.build: npm run assemble && npm run html && npm run pdf
scripts.html: npm run assemble && marp presentation.md -o presentation.html
scripts.pdf: npm run assemble && marp presentation.md --pdf -o presentation.pdf
scripts.pptx: npm run assemble && marp presentation.md --pptx -o presentation.pptx
scripts.preview: npm run assemble && rm -rf preview && marp presentation.md --images png -o preview/slide.png
